title: Shader Reload
description: A mod that allows vanilla shader reloading with F3+R, made for fabric loader.
body:
# Shader Reload

A mod that allows vanilla shader reloading with F3+R, made for fabric loader.

 

Meant to be used while developing resourcepacks using vanilla shaders:

- Reloads much faster than F3+T, especially with large resourcepacks.

- Won't remove resourcepacks if an exception is found while loading.

- Displays shader parse exceptions in chat so you don't have to be constantly looking at the game logs.

- Makes the game handle linker errors closer to how it handles compile errors.
 

Gone are the days of waiting for two loading screens before having to navigate the options menu for the fifth time in a row!
